skola-formation.title: 1,200 leads/month for a training provider
skola-formation.description: Complete overhaul of Skola's paid acquisition—from irregular lead volume to a predictable engine generating 1,200+ qualified inquiries per month.
objectives: Reduce cost per lead below 55 DH
Improve lead quality passed to advisors
strategy: Full Meta Ads account restructure into ABO campaigns
Dedicated landing pages per program with ongoing A/B tests
Email + WhatsApp nurturing for warm leads

testimonials.quote: In 6 months, EduGrowth multiplied our enrollments by 4. A data-driven, transparent team.
testimonials.author: Camille Robert

campusup-search.title: 6.1x ROAS via Google Ads for CampusUp
campusup-search.description: Capturing high-intent Google demand for CampusUp with a Search + Performance Max structure that dramatically increased return on ad spend.
objectives: Capture search demand for certified training programs
Maximize ROAS on a constrained budget
strategy: Performance Max campaigns fed with premium assets
Ongoing bid and Quality Score optimization
CRM connection for optimization on qualified leads

testimonials.quote: CPL cut in half and a pipeline we can finally read. Responsive, transparent team.
testimonials.author: Mehdi Lefort

edunext-automation.title: Automated enrollment funnel for EduNext
edunext-automation.description: A multichannel nurturing engine that converts dormant leads into enrollments—with no human touch on the first steps.
strategy: Lead scoring and segmentation in the CRM

testimonials.quote: The funnel they built runs on its own. We fill our sessions ahead of schedule.
testimonials.author: Sophie Nguyen

millennia-group-prive.title: Social media identity & acquisition for Millennia (Marrakech)
millennia-group-prive.description: End-to-end digital communication for Millennia Group Privé in Marrakech (languages, IT, TELC/Goethe prep). Premium visual identity and multilingual social campaigns (Arabic, French) that boosted enrollment inquiries.
objectives: Build a consistent, recognizable visual identity on social
Generate a steady flow of training enrollment requests
Cover the full offer: German, English, French, Spanish, IT
Engage the community around key moments (Ramadan, Eid, hiring, news)
strategy: Art direction and on-brand template rollouts
Multilingual editorial calendar (Arabic / French) on Instagram & Facebook
Promotional visuals (language packs + free IT add-on)
Trainer recruitment campaigns and brand posts
Seasonal and awareness content to maximize engagement

testimonials.quote: Our social presence is now professional and consistent. The visuals finally reflect our center's image.
testimonials.author: Management
